site.name: FYC Connect
site.description: Friends Youth Club - Nagercoil. 25 years of community service since 2000.
home.hero.title: Serving Our Community Together
home.hero.subtitle: Blood donation, public issues, community events — all in one platform
home.services.title: What We Do
home.services.blood.title: Blood Donation
home.services.blood.desc: Find blood donors in your area. Help in emergencies by connecting with verified donors.
home.services.issues.title: Report Issues
home.services.issues.desc: Report road, street light, and water supply issues. Our volunteers track resolution.
home.services.events.title: Community Events
home.services.events.desc: Tree planting, blood camps, Independence Day — join all FYC community events.
home.services.volunteer.title: Volunteer
home.services.volunteer.desc: Join our team and serve the community. Earn verified digital certificates.
home.about.title: About FYC
home.about.text: Friends Youth Club (FYC) was founded in Nagercoil in 2000. For 25 years, we have been committed to community service, environmental protection, and social welfare.

about.title: About FYC
about.history.title: Our History
about.history.text: Friends Youth Club was born in Nagercoil in 1998 and officially registered in 2000. Over 25 years: 80+ events organized, 1200+ blood donation assists, 1500+ trees planted.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.text: We are committed to social welfare, environmental protection, educational support, and health services for our community.
about.values.title: Our Values
